nlq: How many customers are from Canada?
golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public.customers WHERE country = 'Canada'

nlq: What is the total amount spent by customer John Doe?
golden_sql: SELECT SUM(O.total_amount) FROM public.orders O JOIN public.customers C ON O.customer_id = C.customer_id WHERE C.full_name = 'John Doe'

nlq: List the 5 most expensive products in the Electronics category.
golden_sql: SELECT product_id, name, price FROM public.products WHERE category = 'Electronics' ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 5

nlq: Show the names of products that have been ordered more than 10 times in total quantity.
golden_sql: SELECT P.name, SUM(OI.quantity) AS total_ordered FROM public.products P JOIN public.order_items OI ON P.product_id = OI.product_id GROUP BY P.product_id, P.name HAVING SUM(OI.quantity) > 10

nlq: What is the total quantity of SuperWidget purchased by customers in Seattle?
golden_sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(OI.quantity), 0) FROM public.order_items OI JOIN public.products P ON OI.product_id = P.product_id JOIN public.orders O ON OI.order_id = O.order_id JOIN public.customers C ON O.customer_id = C.customer_id WHERE P.name = 'SuperWidget' AND C.city = 'Seattle'
